samplingFrame: Core 28-document set drawn from Abraham Lincoln's speeches, letters, and public addresses (1838-1865), selected for full annotation in lincoln-metaphor-analysis. A v4 expansion to 48 core documents is tracked in PPW #195. Validation (75-100 docs) and reference tiers are tracked in PPW #196 and #197 respectively.
notes: Document-level metadata (titles, dates, source URLs) will be populated by PPW #195 (48-doc core inventory), #196 (validation tier), and #197 (reference tier). No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15. Raw text import planned for Milestone 16 (PPW #198).
